scripts.test:contracts: bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const hasContracts = fs.existsSync('packages/contracts/package.json'); const hasTestUtils = fs.existsSync('packages/test-utils/package.json'); if (!hasContracts && !hasTestUtils) { console.log('No contract workspaces yet; skipping until Phase 2.'); process.exit(0); } const result = spawnSync('bun', ['x', 'turbo', 'run', 'test', '--filter=@kclub/contracts', '--filter=@kclub/test-utils'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
